nation: Conseil de la Première Nation Abitibiwinni
one_time_description: Gain on fair value revaluation of listed investments (Sayona Mining, Korara Resources, Sphinx Resources)
economic_notes: Nation holds equity investments in Sayona Mining Ltd (27,500,000 shares), Korara Resources Inc. (266,667 shares), Sphinx Resources Ltd (100,000 shares), and Groupe Forestier CFOR Inc. (27.5%). GBEs include Société de développement économique Amik inc. (100%), Société de gestion hôtelière Anwepin inc. (100% via Amik), and Pourvoirie Mistawak inc. (100% via Amik). Post year-end, real property transferred to Anwepin for $8,325,000 resulting in $6,525,000 loss in next fiscal year.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to failure to retroactively restate comparative figures for an unrecorded liability of $1,204,611 at March 31, 2020 and $1,455,560 at March 31, 2021 related to unused SAC-DGSPNI (Health) funds. Gazonord inc. (76% owned subsidiary) consolidated at 100% as it does not meet GBE criteria. Three GBEs (Amik, Anwepin, Mistawak) accounted for by modified consolidation (equity method). Large unrealized fair value gain of $6,401,000 on listed investments (primarily Sayona Mining). Post year-end transfer of real property worth $8,325,000 to Anwepin will create $6,525,000 loss in next fiscal year. No remuneration schedule found in provided text. ISC funding calculated as sum of all SAC contribution lines net of repayments. Total government transfers include SAC, SCHL, CDRH, CEPN, CSSSPNQL, Ministère des Forêts, Québec en forme, Secrétariat aux affaires autochtones, Sécurité publique Canada, Sécurité publique du Québec.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
